description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Wednesday, May 20, the board chair Miyauchi, player Hirao, and player Yamada from Chifure AS Elfen Saitama—a women's professional soccer club that uses Akanedai in Hanno as their training base—visited City Hall.

They reported on the recently completed WE League 2025-26 season and shared their hopes for the upcoming season.

The players also engage in community activities in Hanno, aiming to help local children discover the joy of moving their bodies through soccer.

Hanno City will continue to support these players with our full backing.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202605/13592.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Courtesy visit from Chifure AS Elfen Saitama
